sql.mssql: INSERT INTO THGQMGCRIT (CODCRIT, DESCRICAO, PESO, ATIVO) SELECT 1, 'Qualidade', 40, 'S' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGCRIT WHERE CODCRIT = 1)
sql.oracle: INSERT INTO THGQMGCRIT (CODCRIT, DESCRICAO, PESO, ATIVO) SELECT 1, 'Qualidade', 40, 'S' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGCRIT WHERE CODCRIT = 1)

sql.mssql: INSERT INTO THGQMGCRIT (CODCRIT, DESCRICAO, PESO, ATIVO) SELECT 2, 'Tecnico', 30, 'S' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGCRIT WHERE CODCRIT = 2)
sql.oracle: INSERT INTO THGQMGCRIT (CODCRIT, DESCRICAO, PESO, ATIVO) SELECT 2, 'Tecnico', 30, 'S' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGCRIT WHERE CODCRIT = 2)

sql.mssql: INSERT INTO THGQMGCRIT (CODCRIT, DESCRICAO, PESO, ATIVO) SELECT 3, 'Prazo', 20, 'S' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGCRIT WHERE CODCRIT = 3)
sql.oracle: INSERT INTO THGQMGCRIT (CODCRIT, DESCRICAO, PESO, ATIVO) SELECT 3, 'Prazo', 20, 'S' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGCRIT WHERE CODCRIT = 3)

sql.mssql: INSERT INTO THGQMGCRIT (CODCRIT, DESCRICAO, PESO, ATIVO) SELECT 4, 'Seguranca', 10, 'S' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGCRIT WHERE CODCRIT = 4)
sql.oracle: INSERT INTO THGQMGCRIT (CODCRIT, DESCRICAO, PESO, ATIVO) SELECT 4, 'Seguranca', 10, 'S' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGCRIT WHERE CODCRIT = 4)
